Interface GTNetMessageCode

All Known Implementing Classes:
GNetCoreMessageCode, GTNetMessageCodeType
public interface GTNetMessageCode
Common interface for GTNet message codes. This interface is implemented by both GNetCoreMessageCode (library message codes 0-54) and application-specific message code enums (e.g., GTNet app codes 60+). It provides a unified way to work with message codes regardless of whether they are core protocol messages or application-specific messages.

Naming Conventions

Message code names follow a structured naming pattern:
  • Contains _RR_: Message expects a response (RR = Requires Response)
  • Suffix _C: Client-initiated messages (triggered from UI or scheduled jobs)
  • Suffix _S: Server response messages (replies to requests)
  • Contains _SEL_: Targeted at a specific selected remote server
  • Contains _ALL_: Broadcast to all applicable remote servers
See Also:
  • for core protocol message codes

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    byte
    getValue()
    Returns the byte value of this message code.
    default boolean
    isBroadcast()
    Checks if this message code is a broadcast to all peers.
    default boolean
    isClientInitiated()
    Checks if this message code represents a client-initiated message.
    default boolean
    isRequestRequiringResponse()
    Checks if this message code is a request that requires a response.
    default boolean
    isServerResponse()
    Checks if this message code represents a server response.
    default boolean
    isTargeted()
    Checks if this message code targets a specific selected peer.
    String
    name()
    Returns the name of this message code enum constant.

  • Method Details

    • getValue

      byte getValue()
      Returns the byte value of this message code.
      Returns:
      the byte value used for wire protocol and database storage

    • name

      String name()
      Returns the name of this message code enum constant.
      Returns:
      the enum constant name

    • isRequestRequiringResponse

      default boolean isRequestRequiringResponse()
      Checks if this message code is a request that requires a response.
      Returns:
      true if this is an _RR_ type message code

    • isClientInitiated

      default boolean isClientInitiated()
      Checks if this message code represents a client-initiated message.
      Returns:
      true if this message ends with _C (client-initiated)

    • isServerResponse

      default boolean isServerResponse()
      Checks if this message code represents a server response.
      Returns:
      true if this message ends with _S (server response)

    • isBroadcast

      default boolean isBroadcast()
      Checks if this message code is a broadcast to all peers.
      Returns:
      true if this message contains _ALL_

    • isTargeted

      default boolean isTargeted()
      Checks if this message code targets a specific selected peer.
      Returns:
      true if this message contains _SEL_
